title: Little Roots | Outdoor Gardening Tools with Folding Chair, Kids Garden Set, 3pcs Wooden Tools for Ages 3+
features: GARDEN TOOL SET: with folding chair is the perfect companion for young gardeners! Nurture their eagerness to explore the wonders of nature and cultivate their perfect garden!

PORTABLE DESIGN: designed for convenience and portability featuring a sturdy metal frame that offers stability and support for young gardeners, allowing them to comfortably take a break during gardening activities
TOOL BAG: made from durable polyester with a PVC coating, this set keeps essential gardening tools organised and within reach, protecting them from dirt and moisture when not in use

COMPLETE SET: includes folding chair and three steel tools with wooden handles, carefully selected to cater to various gardening tasks such as loosening soil, digging, planting, and weeding, offering precision and control for young gardeners
DURABLE CONSTRUNTION: the folding chair and tool set is built to last, while the wooden handles provide a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue for a positive gardening experience
description: From the manufacturer Kids Complete Tool Set The Little Roots Folding Chair and Tool Set is a perfect companion for young gardeners eager to explore the wonders of nature and cultivate their green thumbs! This innovative set combines functionality, comfort, and durability to create an immersive gardening experience for children. Whether they're planting flowers, harvesting vegetables, or simply enjoying the outdoors, kids can take a break and relax on this compact and lightweight chair. It also features a detachable tool bag, providing easy access to essential gardening tools while keeping them organized and within reach. Made from durable polyester with a PVC coating, the tool bag is built to withstand the rigors of outdoor use, protecting the tools from dirt, moisture, and wear. Portable Chair Constructed with a sturdy metal frame, this chair offers stability and support, ensuring a safe and comfortable seating option for young gardeners 3 Piece Set Ideal garden set to introduce children to the joys of gardening, providing them with essential tools! Carry Bag The tool bag helps little ones to store their gardening kit safely away until next gardening season
